title: [Documentation provided] How to install on Ubuntu 24.04?
body:
### Issue Description

How do I install on Ubuntu 24.04

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Install fails with `apt install podman`; and besides that an old version https://packages.ubuntu.com/noble/podman

### Describe the results you received

N/A

### Describe the results you expected

N/A

### podman info output

```yaml
N/A
```


### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

_No response_

### Additional information

Solution:
```sh
$ sudo apt install qemu-utils qemu-system-x86
$ curl -OL https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/releases/download/v0.7.3/gvproxy-linux-amd64
# ^ or a newer from https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/releases
$ sudo mkdir /usr/local/lib/podman
$ sudo install -m 0755 gvproxy-linux-amd64 /usr/local/lib/podman/gvproxy
$ curl -OL https://github.com/containers/podman/releases/download/v5.1.1/podman-remote-static-linux_amd64.tar.gz
# ^ or a newer from https://github.com/containers/podman/releases
$ tar xf podman-remote-static-linux_amd64.tar.gz
$ mv bin/* # choose a binary directory in your PATH as the destination
```

Then you should be able to run these two without error:
```sh
$ podman machine init
$ podman machine start
```
